pages.text: When a brewing step fails, you will end up with a failed brew. There are several kinds of failed brews, distinguished by their lore, each hinting at the reason for the failure:$(li)Missing Ingredients$(li)Incorrect Amounts$(li)Incorrect $(thing)$(l:brewery:workstations/distillery_station)Distillation$()$(li)Incorrect $(thing)$(l:brewery:workstations/brewing_cauldron)Brewing Time$()$(li)Incorrect $(thing)$(l:brewery:workstations/fermentation_barrel)Aging$()$(li)$(thing)$(l:brewery:workstations/fermentation_barrel)Spoiled Brew$()
